title: Anna Nadai Lyrics Thagararu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Anna Nadai
Singer(s):  Velmurugan, Chinna Ponnu
Music: Dharan Kumar
Movie: Thagararu

Ye anna nadai, azhagu nadai
asathuraadaa aapa kadai
Chinna idai, minnum udai
iva angamellaam thanga kadai

Ye anna nadai, azhagu nadai
asathuraadaa aapa kadai
Chinna idai, minnum udai
iva angamellaam thanga kadai

ye anna anna anna anna nadai azhagu nadai
asathuraadaa aapa kadai
Chinna idai, minnum udai
iva angamellaam thanga kadai

thooongaadha ooru madhura da
naan pokkaadha thanga kudhirada
ada paakaadha aalu illada
enna thorandhupaaru manasu vella da (Ye anna nadai..)

Ye velavetti illaama summaathaana suthurom
un azhaga paathuputtu moolakettu nikkurom
unga ammaa ennaku atha
unnaku ezhudhi vaikuren en sotha
eduthuvacha roopaa nota
adi enga vandhu naanum kutha ..

Aathu thanni pola naanada
ena azhuku vara alli kudida
sandhanathil senja ponnuda
unaku saarayam weaku kannuda (Ye anna nadai..)

Ye ribbonula lovenga thachikitta unnaku
pogudhadi nenjuvali ennaku
ne annaipatti meen kuzhambu
adi amsavalli biriyaani
rani villaa saapaadu
adi senjirukken erppaadu

ye genda meenu kanna paathuta
ada pombalaikum aasa vaum da
ye kirangadikkum kaala paathuta
sethavanum yendhiripaanda     (Ye anna nadai..)

thooongaadha ooru madhura da
naan pokkaadha thanga kudhirada
ada paakaadha aalu illada
enna thorandhupaaru manasu vella da

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Anna Nadai'?

'Anna Nadai' celebrates the beauty of life and the joy of togetherness, making it a perfect dance number for festive occasions.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thagararu'?

In Thagararu, this song is featured during a lively celebration, showcasing the characters' happiness and camaraderie.

Who are the singers of 'Anna Nadai'?

The song is sung by Chinna Ponnu and Velmurugan, both known for their energetic performances.

Who composed the music for 'Anna Nadai'?

The music for this catchy track was composed by Dharan Kumar, known for his vibrant and engaging compositions.

When was 'Anna Nadai' released?

'Anna Nadai' was released on November 18, 2013, as part of the Thagararu soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Anna Nadai' from the movie Thagararu is a lively and upbeat track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. It features the vibrant voices of Chinna Ponnu and Velmurugan, who bring an infectious energy to the song. The lyrics convey a sense of happiness and togetherness, making it perfect for festive occasions. Overall, the song evokes feelings of joy and excitement, encouraging listeners to dance and celebrate life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Anna Nadai from Thagararu is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring the dynamic voices of Chinna Ponnu and Velmurugan. With Dharan Kumar's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the lively essence of Tamil music that brings people together in joyous moments.
stanzaMeanings: Oh brother, the beautiful way of walking is like a sweet shop. This small body, shining with beauty, is like a treasure shop.
Look at my ice cream, Laila.
Oh brother, the beautiful way of walking is like a sweet shop. This small body, shining with beauty, is like a treasure shop.
Oh brother, oh brother, oh brother, the beautiful way of walking is like a sweet shop. This small body, shining with beauty, is like a treasure shop.
In this lively town, I won't sleep. I won't let go of the golden horse. If I don't see it, what will they show me? My heart is shining.
Without any hesitation, we just roam around. Looking at your beauty, we are mesmerized. I am writing about your mother, and I have taken your form as my own.
Like water, I am coming to you. In the sweet fragrance of the drink, I am yours, my dear.
In this ribbon, love is tied. Your heart is going away. I think about you, brother, like fish curry. I have made a biryani, and it is served.
Look at the fish, it is beautiful. The girls will desire it. The one who looks at the fish will also be caught.
In this lively town, I won't sleep. I won't let go of the golden horse. If I don't see it, what will they show me? My heart is shining.
